title: Satin Croatian Seafood Casserole
description: A winey, gooey, comforting casserole packed with grape tomatoes and mixed seafood, finished in a bain-marie for silky texture.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C and set up a bain-marie by placing a baking dish in a larger pan filled with 5 cm of water.
Toss the seafood with olive oil, garlic, paprika, oregano, and a pinch of salt in a bowl until well coated.
Arrange the grape tomatoes around the seafood in the baking dish and pour the white wine and fish stock over the top.
Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese and chopped basil over the mixture, cover with foil and place the dish in the bain-marie.
Bake for 30 minutes until the seafood is opaque and the sauce is silky.
Remove the foil, bake an additional 5 minutes to lightly brown the top.
Let the casserole rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot with crusty bread or a light salad.
